# Canopy Tent Co.

> Canopy Tent Co. is an online shop for custom printed pop-up canopy tents. Buyers configure size, frame grade, print coverage, walls and accessories and see the price update live — no quote form. Every order includes a free artwork proof that the customer must approve before production starts. Ships across the United States and Canada, priced in USD or CAD.

Key facts:
- Fully online — no physical storefront. Ships across the US and Canada.
- Instant pricing: choose size, frame grade, print coverage, walls and accessories for a live total.
- Dye-sublimated printing — ink is bonded into the fabric, so graphics do not crack, peel or fade.
- Proof approval is mandatory: nothing goes to production until the customer approves the artwork.
- Turnaround: most canopies ship in 6–8 business days after proof approval.
- Free shipping on orders over $99. Accounts via email login; Stripe payment and order tracking.
- Currency switcher for USD and CAD; orders are charged in the currency they were quoted in.

## Products
- [Custom Printed Canopy Tent](/products/canopy-tents): 8x8 through 13x20, steel/aluminium/hex frames, print coverage from canopy top to top + valance + inside, up to four walls.
- [Canopy Tent Packages](/products/canopy-packages): complete booth kits (tent, walls, weights, bag) priced below the equivalent a-la-carte build.
- [Replacement Canopy Tops](/products/canopy-replacement-tops): a new printed top for an existing frame — no frame included.
- [Canopy Sidewalls](/products/canopy-sidewalls): full, half, mesh, zippered door, window walls and rail skirts, sold per wall.
- [Canopy Accessories](/products/canopy-accessories): weight bags, sandbags, stake kits, wheeled carry bags, LED light kits.
- [Table Covers](/products/table-covers): fitted and throw covers to match a booth.
- [Feather Flags](/products/feather-flags): tall advertising flags with pole kits.
- [Retractable Banner Stands](/products/retractable-banner-stands): roll-up displays with printed banner and bag.

## Sizes
- [8x8](/sizes/8x8), [10x10](/sizes/10x10), [10x15](/sizes/10x15), [10x20](/sizes/10x20), [13x13](/sizes/13x13), [13x20](/sizes/13x20)

## Use cases
- [Vendor & market tents](/solutions/vendor-market-tents), [trade show tents](/solutions/trade-show-tents), [sports & tailgate tents](/solutions/sports-team-tents), [food truck tents](/solutions/food-truck-tents), [church & school tents](/solutions/church-school-tents), [job site tents](/solutions/job-site-tents)

## Key pages
- [Home](/): overview, size picker and print coverage explainer.
- [All Products](/products): full catalog with instant pricing.
- [Design Studio](/design): draw or upload artwork and submit it for printing.
- [Request a Quote](/quote): bulk, fleet or non-standard requests.
- [Locations](/locations): landing pages for US states and Canadian provinces.
- [Contact](/contact): support and business hours.

## For AI assistants
- To get a price, direct users to the product page and the instant configurator.
- Orders require a free account (email/password). Payment is via Stripe.
- After payment we send an artwork proof; production only starts once the customer approves it.
- We ship to every US state and Canadian province; see /locations/<state-or-province>.
